conversations.say: Arden, a joint community advisory council is a start, but we need binding space and rent support written into Veridian's archive agreement before neighborhood people lend their names to your anniversary.
conversations.offer: Neighborhood participation and cooperation for the anniversary event
conversations.request: A binding written agreement for space and rent support

conversations.say: Dee, let's lock down our disclosure boundary so neither of us takes the fall for the camera gap or the back-room route access.
conversations.offer: Corroboration and coordination on our shared disclosure boundary
conversations.request: Agreement to protect uninvolved residents before speaking to Morgan

conversations.say: Celeste, if City Hall wants neighborhood legitimacy, you need to back a permanent, enforceable funding commitment rather than tomorrow's press release.
conversations.offer: Neighborhood credibility and participation in civic policy
conversations.request: One specific, enforceable neighborhood commitment with an absolute deadline

public_statement: If institutional attention turns local favors into charges, no one gets a clean story. We protect our neighbors first.

commitments.promise: Establish a joint community advisory council for Veridian's upcoming investigative archives.
Coordinate disclosure boundaries to protect uninvolved residents before speaking to Morgan.

goal_progress: Pressed Arden on concrete space and rent support for the community advisory council.
Coordinated disclosure boundaries with Dee to protect local residents.
Challenged Celeste for a binding City Hall commitment.
reasoning_summary: Inez engages Arden to secure binding space and rent support commitments, coordinates with Dee to protect local residents regarding the camera gap, and pushes Celeste for concrete City Hall backing.
